title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Elon Musk’s X Appears to Be Violating US Sanctions by Selling Premium Accounts to Iranian Leaders

items.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
items.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

items.title: Our Favorite TV Is Still Almost Half Off
items.description: Best Buy continues to sell the TCL QM6K for a staggering discount.

items.title: Trump administration undermines EPA enforcement of Clean Air Act
items.description: The EPA's new rule seeks to undo a 2009 finding that allowed the federal government to regulate six greenhouse gases.

items.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot

items.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
items.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

items.title: Hacker linked to Epstein removed from Black Hat cyber conference website

items.title: OpenAI’s President Gave Millions to Trump. He Says It’s for Humanity
items.description: In an interview with WIRED, Greg Brockman says his political donations support OpenAI's mission—even if some employees at the company disagree.

items.title: A Wave of Unexplained Bot Traffic Is Sweeping the Web
items.description: From small publishers to US federal agencies, websites are reporting unusual spikes in automated traffic linked to IP addresses in Lanzhou, China.
